name: Halibut Broccoli Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen chopped broccoli - thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 2 cups grated cheddar cheese, flaked halibut, finely chopped onion, and thawed frozen broccoli.
2. Place the mixture in a greased 10-inch pie plate.
3. In a separate bowl, beat together milk, eggs, Bisquick baking mix, lemon pepper, minced garlic, and dried thyme leaves.
4. Pour the batter over the halibut-broccoli mixture.
5. Bake at 400 degrees F for 25-35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Top with remaining grated cheddar cheese and bake an additional 1-2 minutes to melt the cheese.
7. Let cool for 5 minutes, then cut into wedges.
8. Garnish with chopped tomato and parsley.
